name: @vela-rbxts/vscode-extension
description: VSCode extension that launches the standalone vela-rbxts Rust LSP.

velaRbxts.lsp.serverPath.description: Optional path to the standalone vela-rbxts LSP executable. When empty, the extension uses the published @vela-rbxts/lsp wrapper package when its platform binary dependency is installed, otherwise it falls back to a local Cargo-based development launch from packages/lsp.

velaRbxts.lsp.trace.server.description: Trace level forwarded to the vela-rbxts language client.

velaRbxts.lsp.enabled.description: Enable the standalone vela-rbxts Rust LSP integration for TypeScript and TSX files.
